mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADS ( AD_ID, BRAND_NAME, MANAGER_NAME, COMPANY_EMAIL, PHONE, CONTENT, START_DATE, END_DATE, DURATION_WEEKS, AMOUNT, FILE_PATH, AGREED_YN, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_AD_ID.NEXTVAL, #{brandName}, #{managerName}, #{companyEmail}, #{phone}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{durationWeeks}, #{amount}, #{filePath}, #{agreedYn}, 'WAIT', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT AD_ID as adId, BRAND_NAME as brandName, MANAGER_NAME as managerName, COMPANY_EMAIL as companyEmail, PHONE as phone, CONTENT as content, START_DATE as startDate, END_DATE as endDate, DURATION_WEEKS as durationWeeks, AMOUNT as amount, STATUS as status, CREATED_AT as createdAt, APPROVED_AT as approvedAt FROM ADS ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT USER_NO as userNo, NAME as name, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone FROM MEMBER WHERE LOGINID = #{loginid}

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone, REG_DATE as regDate, STATUS as status, IDLE as idle, SUSPENDED as suspended, MANNER_TEMP as mannerTemp FROM MEMBER ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone, REG_DATE as regDate, STATUS as status, IDLE as idle, SUSPENDED as suspended, MANNER_TEMP as mannerTemp FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TRUNC(REG_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE status = 0

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_desc AS productDesc, p.product_price AS productPrice, p.seller_email AS sellerEmail, p.category_no AS categoryNo, p.trade_status AS tradeStatus, p.reg_date AS regDate, m.nickname AS sellerNickname FROM products p JOIN member m ON p.seller_email = m.email ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE TRADE_STATUS = '판매중'

SELECT AD_ID AS adId, BRAND_NAME AS brandName, MANAGER_NAME AS managerName, COMPANY_EMAIL AS companyEmail, PHONE AS phone, CONTENT AS content, START_DATE AS startDate, END_DATE AS endDate, FILE_PATH AS filePath, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt FROM ADS WHERE AD_ID = #{adId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ads SET status='CONFIRM', approved_at = SYSDATE WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
UPDATE ads SET status='REJECT', rejected_reason = #{reason}, approved_at = SYSDATE WHERE ad_id = #{adId}

choose.when: SELECT TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'MM/DD') as label, COUNT(*) as count FROM member WHERE reg_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'MM/DD') ORDER BY label ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM') as label, COUNT(*) as count FROM member WHERE reg_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY label ASC

mapper.select: SELECT keyword, COUNT(*) as "count" FROM search_log WHERE searched_at >= SYSDATE - 1 GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY "count" DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inquiry_id as inquiryId, title, member_email as memberEmail, created_at as createdAt, inquiry_status as inquiryStatus, is_faq as isFaq, is_private as isPrivate FROM inquiries WHERE is_faq = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT inquiry_id as inquiryId, title, member_email as memberEmail, created_at as createdAt, inquiry_status as inquiryStatus, is_faq as isFaq, is_private as isPrivate FROM inquiries WHERE is_faq = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'MM-DD') AS REG_DATE, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM PRODUCTS WHERE REG_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'MM-DD') ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME, COUNT(P.PRODUCT_NO) AS CNT FROM CATEGORY C LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS P ON C.CATEGORY_NO = P.CATEGORY_NO GROUP BY C.CATEGORY_NAME ORDER BY CNT DESC
